entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Enemies — Myriad Snare: Rustfire Chassis
entry.content: A ruined giant shadow lurking within the Skyworks. It has nearly been forgotten, yet still clings to the directive to wipe out the Tacet Discords to the bitter end.

entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Enemies — Thousand-Puppet Pavilion
entry.content: A massive Autopuppet formed by absorbing the buildings of the Censure Court, bound by the battlefields of old, and bringing down merciless blades upon the enemies before it.

entry.title: New Challenge Cycle for "Endstate Matrix" Coming Soon!
entry.content: After the Version 3.5 update, Endstate Matrix will enter its second Challenge Cycle, Adversity Vanguard. The challenge rules and rewards will also be updated. Rovers, come check out the details!

entry.title: Post-Lament Anthropocene: Comprehensive Mirror for Historian — Land of Xuanfang
entry.content: The Land of Xuanfang lies wedged between Jinzhou and Mengzhou, its formidable Xuanfang Hold containing much of the chaos unleashed by the Norfall Barrens' TD Outbreak. Xuanfang Hold stands as the ultimate destination for Automata Mechanics, pulsing under the watchful control of the colossal Celestial Ring Formation, a belt encircling the entire fortress. When threats arise, the city responds with ingenious creations known as Autopuppets. Bricks and tiles twist and rearrange themselves in an instant, while beams and pillars assemble into cages that trap monsters or transform into Autopuppets that eliminate them.

entry.title: Event Preview | [Lament Recon: Tacet Crisis] Combat Event, Coming Soon!
entry.content:
Duration

2026-07-11 10:00 - 2026-08-19 11:59 (server time)

Rewards

Astrite x1200, Space and Blake Bloom Medal (Event Sigil), Space and Blake Bloom (Event Avatar), Modifier, Premium Tuner, Forgery Premium Supply - Lahai-Roi, Premium Enclosure Tank - Land of Xuanfang, Shell Credit, and other materials.

entry.title: Tidal Photography: Land of Xuanfang Photo Challenge is now underway!
entry.content:
Duration: From now until 2026-08-19 23:59 (UTC+8)

With the new region [Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang] available for exploration,

Tidal Photography - Land of Xuanfang Photo Challenge is now underway!

Take part in the event for a chance to win Astrites and cash incentives!

"Recaptured: Action Highlights" Combat Photography Event will also launch on July 16th (UTC+8).

So, step into the new realm, dive into the new gameplay, and capture the unforgettable moments that are yours to cherish.

How to Submit

You can submit your work in the following ways:

  1. Use the Camera feature or take a screenshot to capture in-game footage. Apply your preferred filter and frame the Resonators as they explore the Land of Xuanfang or its landscapes.

  2. Join the "Recaptured: Action Highlights" Combat Photography Event in either the [Freeze Frame: Whispering Feathers] or the [Freeze Frame: Gentle Stream] challenge. Choose your desired Resonator, add a filter and frame customization, and use the Slow Motion Gadget to capture their battle scenes.

Post your work on X (Twitter)/Instagram/Facebook with both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuWaMoment included on X (Twitter)/Instagram/Facebook, and fill out the form for a chance to win Astrites and cash incentives!

  • Please quote your post link published publicly on social media.

Rewards

Entries will go through a rigorous judging process based on their quality and statistics before winners are decided. Winners will be awarded Astrites and cash incentives!

Proceed to submit: <https://forms.gle/TJZwXVQTgRtVMkodA>

entry.title: FAQ – Xbox
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

Wuthering Waves will officially launch on Xbox on July 10, 2026 (UTC+8). To address common questions about linking your Microsoft account with your Kuro Games account and syncing your game progress, we've prepared the following FAQ. Please take a moment to review it to ensure a smooth start to your adventure in Solaris-3.

Xbox Game Pass Benefits

Q: After Wuthering Waves launches on Xbox, what are the requirements for claiming the Xbox Game Pass benefits pack?

A: Once Wuthering Waves is officially released, if the Microsoft account linked to your Kuro Games account has an active Xbox Game Pass subscription (including PC Game Pass), you can claim the benefits pack via "Terminal" > "Mail" in-game after linking your account and logging in. Please note that the portion of the benefits pack that refreshes with each version must be claimed by logging in with an account that has an active XGP subscription before the current version ends, or it will not be delivered.

Cross-Platform Progress Syncing

Q: Will my progress on different servers or platforms be shared under the same Kuro Games account after the Xbox launch?

A: Your progress will not be shared between different servers (e.g., Asia Server and Europe Server). However, within the same server, progress is synced across multiple platforms (PC, Android, iOS, Xbox, and PS5™).

If you start your journey on Xbox, you can later switch to PC or mobile platforms by logging in with the same Kuro Games account linked to your Microsoft account, carrying over your Xbox progress. Similarly, if you begin on PC or mobile, you can continue on Xbox using the same Kuro Games account to carry over your PC/mobile progress.

Q: How can I sync my game progress between Xbox and other platforms?

A: Please link your Microsoft account to the Kuro Games account you wish to use, and make sure you select the same server/region when logging in on other platforms, in order to enable cross-platform progress syncing.

Please note: If you're using a third-party login method such as Google or Facebook, you must first link a Kuro Games account email via "Settings" > "Account Settings" > "User Center" in-game before your progress can carry over properly. Simply verifying through the registration email of a third-party login method (e.g., Google or Facebook) will not complete progress synchronization — please keep this in mind.

Q: Which servers are available for the Xbox version of Wuthering Waves?

A: The Xbox version currently supports the Asia, Southeast Asia, Europe, America, and HMT (Hong Kong, Macau, Taiwan) servers. The first time you log into the game on Xbox, you'll need to link your current Microsoft account to a server/region. Once linked, this cannot be changed again, and the link is only valid for the Xbox platform.

In-game Purchase

Q: Can I use items purchased on PC/Android/iOS platforms (Lunites, Lunite Subscription, etc.) on Xbox after linking my account?

A: Yes, once your accounts are linked, any items purchased on one platform will be displayed and accessible on all other platforms.

Q: Why hasn't my purchase from the Xbox Store/Web Store been delivered?

A: Items purchased through the Xbox Store or Web Store will be processed for delivery after you log into your game character. If you experience a delivery issue, please try the following methods in order:

Method 1: Restart the game and log back in to check for a delivery notification.

Method 2: Check "Terminal" > "Backpack" to see if the purchased items have arrived in your inventory.

Method 3: Verify that the Microsoft account you're currently logged into is the same one used to make the purchase.

If none of these methods resolve the issue, please contact customer support via "Terminal" > "Feedback" in-game.

Q: If I create a new game character on Xbox, can I make purchases for this character on PC/mobile?

A: Yes, you can make purchases for this character on PC, mobile, or through the official website.

Account Linking

Q: How do I link my Microsoft account to my Kuro Games account?

A: Depending on your situation, you can complete account linking using one of the following two methods.

Method 1: If you've already created a Kuro Games account, we recommend logging in with your existing account. The first time you enter Wuthering Waves on Xbox, select "Already have an account? Log in" and follow the prompts to link your Kuro Games account with your current Microsoft account.

Note: If you log in this way, we recommend setting a password for your Kuro Games account via "Settings" > "Account Settings" > "User Center" in-game to strengthen your account security.

Method 2: Create a new Kuro Games account using your current Microsoft account. The first time you enter Wuthering Waves on Xbox, select "Create a Kuro Games account" to log into the game.

Note: If you log in this way, we recommend linking an email and setting a password via "Settings" > "Account Settings" > "User Center" in-game, so you can access the same account on other platforms going forward.

Q: I've already played Wuthering Waves on PC/mobile and linked my Microsoft account to a Kuro Games account, but after entering the game I find my progress still isn't syncing?

A: The Kuro Games account linked to your Microsoft account isn't the same Kuro Games account you used on PC/mobile.

After logging in on Xbox, go to "Settings" > "Account Settings" > "User Center" in-game to check whether your currently linked account ID matches the one you use on PC/mobile.

If you need to log into Wuthering Waves with a different Kuro Games account, try the following methods:

Method 1: Create a new Microsoft account and re-enter the game to link it with the Kuro Games account used on other platforms.

Method 2: Request account unlinking support via "Terminal" > "Feedback" in-game.

Q: After playing on Xbox, how can I continue my Xbox progress on PC/mobile?

A: If you'd like to carry over your Xbox game progress to PC/mobile, please follow these steps:

Step 1: Make sure your Kuro Games account has a password set. You can set this via "Settings" > "Account Settings" > "User Center" in the Xbox version of the game.

  1. When you open the game on PC/mobile, log in using the email linked to your Microsoft account along with the password you set.

Q: How can I check which Kuro Games account is currently linked to my Microsoft account?

A: After logging into the game, you can check this via "Settings" > "Account Settings" > "User Center."

Q: After linking my Microsoft account to my Kuro Games account, can I unlink or change the linked account?

A: Yes. You can request to unlink your Microsoft account via "Terminal" > "Feedback" in-game. After unlinking, your progress under your Kuro Games account will not be lost, but it will no longer be shared with your Microsoft account. You will also no longer be able to access any game progress saved to that Kuro Games account via your Microsoft account. In addition, each Kuro Games account can only unlink a Microsoft account once, so please consider carefully before doing this.

Before switching linked accounts, we recommend linking an email or setting a password for your current Kuro Games account via "Settings" > "Account Settings" > "User Center," to avoid losing access to your account if you're unable to log in another way after unlinking your Microsoft account.

Q: Will I lose my existing game progress under my Kuro Games account after unlinking?

A: No. Unlinking your Microsoft account only removes the data sharing between your Microsoft account and your Kuro Games account. You can still use your Kuro Games account to log in on other platforms and access your existing game progress.

Q: If the game closes unexpectedly before the linking pop-up appears during my first login on Xbox, can I still link my accounts afterward?

A: Yes. If this happens, simply restart the game and follow the pop-up prompts to link your accounts.

Q: After linking my account, can I log in on other platforms (e.g., PC, Android, iOS) using my Microsoft account, or use a different login method on Xbox?

A: No. Currently, the Xbox version of Wuthering Waves only supports logging in with a Microsoft account linked to a Kuro Games account, and other platforms do not support logging in with a Microsoft account.

Q: Can my Microsoft account be linked to multiple Kuro Games accounts? Or can my Kuro Games account be linked to multiple Microsoft accounts?

A: No, each Microsoft account can only be linked to one Kuro Games account.

entry.title: V3.5 Wuthering Waves Battle Rush
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

The Wuthering Waves Battle Rush is now live! Record and share your most exciting battle moments with the hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuwaBattle on X (Twitter)/YouTube Shorts/TikTok to compete for a reward of Astrite x2,000 and a chance to get featured on our social media with direct credits! Other than these rewards, 10 extra winners will be selected to receive a $50 Amazon Gift Card.

Showcase your outstanding battle tactics in a condensed clip and share them with us!

Content Requirement

Create your own combat video featuring Wuthering Waves.

We require no limits to the characters, level, or scenes. All entries that feature your combat in Wuthering Waves are qualified to join the event and compete for rewards!

How to Submit

Post your work on X (Twitter)/YouTube Shorts/TikTok with both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuwaBattle included publicly.

Submission Period

2026/07/10 - 2026/08/07 (PT)

Judging Criteria

All eligible works will undergo evaluation based on their adherence to the theme, degree of completion, reception among players, and other relevant factors.

Notes

To qualify for participation, you should include both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuwaBattle in your post.

Deleted posts will not be qualified for entitlement of rewards.

You can submit multiple entries. However, the same work published on different platforms will not count towards the rewards.

Entries listed below may be excluded from the judging process:

  • Works not created in accordance with Wuthering Waves

  • Works found to contain plagiarism or infringement of intellectual property rights

  • Works submitted outside the event period

  • Works created with the assistance of AI technology

  • Works featuring extremely aggressive content, including but not limited to themes of pornography, violence, politics, or racism

  • Works that have already been used for commercial purposes

  • Works deemed inappropriate by the judges

Failure to reply to the official staff within 7 days from the date of notification will be considered a waiver of entitlement to the rewards.

This event is open to submissions from all languages, as creators proficient in any language are eligible to compete for rewards. Entries differing only in language will be treated as equivalent works.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns" is now live!
entry.content:
Dear Rovers,

Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "The Dream Not Dreamed" is now live! Post your work with hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuWaFanart on X (Twitter)/Instagram/Facebook and fill out the form for a chance to win iPhone 16 Pro 512GB, Astrites and more!

Create your works of boundless imagination to present the world of Wuthering Waves!

Proceed to submit:

<https://forms.gle/UKAJ1Ze7BTgUQy9v7>

Content Requirement

Create your own artwork about Wuthering Waves Version 3.4 "The Dream Not Dreamed"!

Whether it's an illustration of your beloved character, comical moments from your adventures, or difficult combos you've mastered—anything that aligns with the theme is eligible for submission. Share your artwork or video for a chance to win exciting prizes!

How to Submit

  1. Post your artwork on X (Twitter)/Instagram/Facebook with both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuWaFanart included.

  2. Complete the submission form with your submission details. Once done, your submission will be considered successful.

  • Please quote your post link with the right hashtags published publicly on the designated platforms.

Submission form:

<https://forms.gle/UKAJ1Ze7BTgUQy9v7>

Submission Period

2026/07/10 - 2026/08/10 (PT)

Rewards

1st Place (5 Winners): iPhone 17 Pro 512GB

2nd Place (5 Winners): 6,000 Astrites & 800 USD

3rd Place (10 Winners): 3,000 Astrites & 400 USD

4th Place (15 Winners): 2,000 Astrites & 200 USD

5th Place (20 Winners): 1,000 Astrites & $50 Amazon Gift Card

Lucky Prize (20 Winners): $20 Amazon Gift Card

Judging Criteria

All eligible works will undergo evaluation based on their adherence to the theme, degree of completion, reception among players, and other relevant factors.

Notes

To qualify for participation, you should include both hashtags #WutheringWaves and #WuWaFanart in your post and fill out the submission form.

Deleted posts will not be qualified for entitlement of rewards.

This fan art campaign allows participants to submit multiple entries. However, each participant can only receive rewards once.

Entries listed below may be excluded from the judging process:

  • Works not created in accordance with Wuthering Waves

  • Works found to contain plagiarism or infringement of intellectual property rights

  • Works submitted outside the event period

  • Works created with the assistance of AI technology

  • Works featuring extremely aggressive content, including but not limited to themes of pornography, violence, politics, or racism

  • Works that have already been used for commercial purposes

  • Works previously entered into other fan creation events

  • Works deemed inappropriate by the judges

Failure to reply to the official staff within 7 days from the date of notification will be considered a waiver of entitlement to the rewards.

This event is open to submissions from all languages, as creators proficient in any language are eligible to compete for rewards. Entries differing only in language will be treated as equivalent works.

By participating in the event, you grant KURO GAMES the right to freely republish your submitted content on the internet and social media platforms, with appropriate credit given to the creator. No additional notice will be provided prior to publication.

This event is available solely to participants on the designated servers listed below: America, Europe, Asia, SEA, HMT(HK,MO,TW).

Winners will be selected through a thorough review and announced before September 10th (PT).

entry.title: Version 3.5 Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns Content Overview
entry.content:
Dear Rovers:

Thank you for your continued support! The details of the Version 3.5 "Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns" update are as follows. Please check them out.

Maintenance Time & Compensation

  • Maintenance Duration: 2026-07-10 04:00 - 2026-07-10 11:00 (UTC+8)

  • Maintenance Compensation: Astrite ×300, Crystal Solvent ×2

  • Eligibility: Create a character and unlock the Mail feature before 2026-07-10 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation mail is valid until the next version update maintenance begins.

Depending on the actual progress of the maintenance, the duration may be extended. The project team will issue follow-up announcements and adjust compensation accordingly.

  • Bug Fix Compensation: Astrite ×300

  • Eligibility for Compensation: Create a character and unlock the Mail function before 2026-07-10 04:00 (UTC+8). The compensation mail is valid until the maintenance for the next version update.

Version Content Overview

New Resonators

5-Star Resonator Yangyang: Xuanling (Havoc | Sword)

Born the second daughter of a renowned musical family in Mingting, she is gentle yet strong, pure of heart and romantic, a lady who draws her sword in the name of justice. As a "Votary of the Voice," she can commune with the Streams. Once an Outrider of the Midnight Rangers in Jinzhou, she now serves as an acting Xuan Watcher of Xuanfang Hold. Free as a breeze, bold in her chivalry, her life and her blade exist only to protect.

Combat Style: Main Damage Dealer, Heavy Attack DMG, Havoc Bane, Traction

Can be obtained through the [Voices on Azure Feathers] Featured Resonator Convene.

5-Star Resonator Suisui (Glacio | Rectifier)

Born into a noble family of Mingting, she is the brilliant young director of the Zhaoming Commerce Guild. Wielding a water fan, she weaves business deals into a grand tapestry of trade. Though she knows no swordplay, her financial mastery stitches together a lasting peace for the world.

Combat Style: Support and Healer, DMG Amplification, Glacio Chafe

Can be obtained through the [Blessings From Dewy Winds] Featured Resonator Convene.

New Rover Resonance Conversion: Rover: Electro

Unlocks after completing Main Quest Chapter IV Act II "Xuanling Sings, Storm Quelled"

New Weapons

5-Star Weapon Azure Oath (Sword)

Forged of flowing wind, sheathed in the azure sky. Once the blade is drawn, all sound falls still.

That never-fading azure is her resolve, her vow, and her ideal.

Can be obtained through the [Azure Oath] Featured Weapon Convene.

5-Star Weapon Firstlight's Herald (Rectifier)

Dawn's glow my paper, morning dew my ink, with brush in hand, a scroll of ceaseless landscapes I paint.

So the legend goes: when the divine bird lowers its gaze, the mountains hush and the rivers still.

Yet, when it raises its head again to loose a piercing cry, the slumbering sun shall rise from beyond the sea of clouds.

Can be obtained through the [Firstlight's Herald] Featured Weapon Convene.

New Region

Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang

This region includes the following areas: Xuanfang Hold, Eastern Xuan Peaks, Western Fang Peaks, and Southern Yuan Hills

The Land of Xuanfang lies between Jinzhou and Mengzhou, where Xuanfang Hold, the famous city of mechanisms, is situated.

In ages past, this region served as a vital frontier of exile, built to contain the countless Tacet Discords spilling from the Norfall Barrens. To this day, hordes of Tacet Discords remain imprisoned within the Censure Cages.

Follow the quest guidance of Main Quest Chapter IV Act I "The Wind Before the Storm" to head there.

New Echoes

Myriad Snare: Rustfire Chassis, Thousand-Puppet Pavilion, Fog Lionarch, Forbidden Bastion, Kernel Puppet: Joy, Kernel Puppet: Anger, Kernel Puppet: Worry, Kernel Puppet: Reflection, Kernel Puppet: Grief, Kernel Puppet: Fright, Fog Lionarch: Body, Fog Lionarch: Head, Smiter, Smolder, Porcelain Picket, Stone Picket, Aureate Picket

  • New Tacet Fields: Western Fang Peaks Tacet Field, Eastern Xuan Peaks Tacet Field

  • New Tacet Discord Nest: Southern Yuan Hills Tacet Discord Nest

  • New Sonata Effects: Lamp of Nether Road (5 pcs), Heart of Evil's Purge (5 pcs), Song of Feathered Trace (5 pcs)

Lamp of Nether Road (5 pcs): Upon gaining a Shield, gain 5% increase in Crit. Rate for 5s, max 4 stacks. This effect can be triggered every 0.5s. At max stacks, gain 15% Fusion DMG Bonus.

Heart of Evil's Purge (5 pcs): Inflicting Tune Strain - Shifting increases Crit. DMG by 20% and Aero DMG Bonus by 30% for 15s.

Song of Feathered Trace (5 pcs): Upon inflicting Havoc Bane, gain Xuanling's Feather, which grants a 20% increase in Crit. Rate and 35% increase in Heavy Attack DMG Bonus to the Resonator, lasting 15s.

Upon inflicting Glacio Chafe, gain Chongming's Feather, which grants a 0.1% increase in ATK to Resonators in the team for every 1% of the Resonator's Energy Regen, up to 25%, lasting 10s.

New Story

[Main Quest] Chapter IV Act I "The Wind Before the Storm"

With affairs in Lahai-Roi coming to a close, you decide to revisit Huanglong, only to unexpectedly learn of Yangyang's disappearance. To find her, you and Yangyang's older sister, Suisui, set out for the Land of Xuanfang in Mengzhou to investigate...

  • Duration✦ Permanent after the Version 3.5 update

  • Eligibility✦ Complete Main Quest Chapter III Segue "We Choose the Sky" to unlock

After the Version 3.5 update, Rovers who meet the requirements for the Pioneer Experience feature can use it to accept Main Quest Chapter IV Act I "The Wind Before the Storm" in advance. Once accepted, Main Quests from different chapters will coexist, allowing you to experience them separately without mutual interference. Using the Pioneer Experience feature will not affect your current quest progress.

[Main Quest] Chapter IV Act II "Xuanling Sings, Storm Quelled"

The Land of Xuanfang is thrown into turmoil following an unexpected riot of out-of-control Autopuppets. As you investigate, you uncover the mastermind behind the scheme—a mysterious Artisan who covets the Sentinel's technology. In the culmination of the event, this figure commands the rogue Autopuppets to launch an assault on Xuanfang Hold...

  • Duration✦ Permanent after the Version 3.5 update

  • Eligibility✦ Complete Main Quest Chapter IV Act I "The Wind Before the Storm" to unlock

[Main Quest] Chapter IV Segue "The Chant of Unseen Ties"

Days after the Autopuppet crisis was solved, Yangyang chooses to stay behind in the Land of Xuanfang to assist the soldiers and the civilians. As she's waiting on her test report, a mysterious voice starts to whisper in her ears...

  • Duration✦ Permanent after the Version 3.5 update

  • Eligibility✦ Complete [Main Quest] Chapter IV Act II "Xuanling Sings, Storm Quelled" to unlock.

Activating the Resonance Nexus in Shaftpost Yard in Main Quest Chapter IV Act I "The Wind Before the Storm" rewards the custom Expedition Motorbike Chassis "Cloud Ride."

[Exploration Quest] "Code Red: Corehazard"

[Exploration Quest] "Faithful Heart Tested at Skyfall"

[Exploration Quest] "Autopuppets in Fog Veiled Chambers"

For a better experience, it is recommended to complete Main Quest Chapter IV Act II "Xuanling Sings, Storm Quelled" before playing Exploration Quest "Faithful Heart Tested at Skyfall."

New Events and Gameplay

Special Events

[A Glimpse of Xuanfang] Exploration Event

Every fragment of Xuanfang Hold stands as a witness, recording the city's every smallest collapse, bearing testament to how solemnly it marches toward ruin.

Gather these fragments and piece together the image of Xuanfang Hold, its past, its present, and its future.

  • Duration: After the Version 3.5 update - 2026-08-19 03:59 (server time)

[Shape of Yesterday] Photo Collection Event

With Xuanfang's crisis at rest, an unfamiliar figure steps into Xianling Village... Bound to this land by a century-old past, he finally returns to homeland he has never known...

  • Duration: Permanently available after the Version 3.5 update

[Lament Recon: Tacet Crisis] Combat Event

To help Solaris prepare for future crises, the Black Shores and Spacetrek Collective have launched a new hologram simulation project. At Yhoran’s invitation, you and your companions step up to take part, ready to fight for humanity's survival in a simulated doomsday.

  • Duration: 2026-07-11 10:00 - 2026-08-19 11:59 (server time)

[Recaptured: Action Highlights] Combat Photography Event

Behold! Wutherium Film Studio Special Feature: Resonators in Combat Edition is back for a limited time!

Capture Resonators' exhilarating moments during combat, then submit the photos to Fulmine and C-MOSS to earn plenty of rewards!

  • Duration: 2026-07-16 10:00 - 2026-08-06 03:59 (server time)

[Virtual Crisis: Quadrant Trials] Crisis Trial Challenge Event

Tethys's crisis simulation program is getting an upgrade. With newly gathered data from Lahai-Roi, harsher scenarios await those who dare to face the challenge…

  • Duration: 2026-07-30 10:00 - 2026-08-19 03:59 (server time)

[Lollo Campaign: New Journey] Limited-Time Commission Event

During the event, complete the daily tasks to claim Lollo Stamps in return for your favor. Lollo Stamps can be exchanged for Lollo Helper special deliveries.

  • Duration: 2026-08-06 04:00 - 2026-08-19 03:59 (server time)

[Gifts of Aftertune] 7-Day Login Event

During the event, log in to the game daily and head to the event page to claim your daily login rewards.

  • Duration: After the Version 3.5 update - 2026-08-19 03:59 (server time)

New Gameplay

[Mingshen Notices] New Permanent Gameplay

Since the founding of Xuanfang Hold, the Constables have kept the peace with the aid of the Mingshen System. Lately, however, a string of suspicious incidents across the Hold has begun to trouble them...

  • Duration: Permanently available after the Version 3.5 update

H5 Web Event

"In Search of Lost Jade" Web Event

Journey deep into the silent cave and help guide the Jadeplume Eagle out of danger and back to its nest. And win Astrites in the process!

Complete event tasks to win Advanced Sealed Tubes and more.

  • Duration: 2026-07-30 10:00 - 2026-08-13 10:00 (UTC+8)

New Store Arrivals

  • Outfits: "Peppermint" (Lynae - Deluxe Outfit), "Peach Parfait" (Chisa - Deluxe Outfit)

  • Accessories: "Cloud Lark" (Yangyang: Xuanling Accessory), "Upon Rosy Clouds" (Suisui Accessory)

  • Expedition Motorbike Model: "Nightveil Piercer" (Premium Model)

New Challenges

  • "Tactical Hologram: Sparring" Challenge: Denia

  • "Endstate Matrix" Cycle 2 Open: Version 3.5 - Version 3.8

Other New Content

  • Expedition Motorbike Chassis: "Cloud Ride"

  • Weapon Projection: "Projection: Blade of a Thousand Arts"

  • Titles: "Virtual Beacon," "Until We Meet Again"

  • Sigils: "Space and Blake Bloom Medal," "Past the Endstate: Adversity Vanguard," "Xuanfang W

onder"

  • Avatar: "Space and Blake Bloom"

Adjustments & Optimizations

Resonators & Weapons

Rover:

Optimized Rover's model appearance.

  • Optimized Rover's model materials and details.

  • Improved Rover's model appearance under various lighting conditions.

Tune Break:

Optimized the trigger mechanism of Tune Break.

  • Added a new way to trigger Tune Break: switching to another Resonator when Tune Break is available can still trigger the Tune Break interaction and refresh its duration.

  • Optimized the trigger method of Tune Break: when a target is in a state where Tune Break can be triggered, the Tune Break interaction can be triggered regardless of whether the target is locked-on. When an attack hits multiple enemies that are all in a state where Tune Break can be triggered, priority will be given to displaying the Tune Break interaction status of the locked-on enemy.

  • Optimized the interaction duration for triggering Tune Break.

  • Optimized the interaction range for triggering Tune Break, unifying the range for all Resonators.

  • Optimized the triggering of Tune Break in certain situations: Tune Break can now be triggered immediately after a Resonator casts their Resonance Liberation or Intro Skill.

  • Added an Accessory preview feature for Resonators. When selecting an accessory in the item details or the Backpack, you can click View to preview it.

  • Optimized the targeting mechanism of Basic Attacks automatically cast when switching Resonators.

System

Expedition Motorbike:

Added the feature to change vehicle models.

  • You can change vehicle models via the Expedition Motorbike - Motorbike Appearance interface.

  • The interface will display the description of the selected model and its supported Customizable Parts.

Added Boosted Drift Settings

  • You can enable this option via Settings - Controls - Vehicle settings.

  • Once enabled, you can drift with the Expedition Motorbike while in the Boost state, and the drift handling performance will be improved.

  • When riding the Expedition Motorbike in Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang and encountering minor environmental obstructions, the motorbike will render partially transparent and continue driving normally through the obstruction.

We plan to improve the motorbike's behavior when passing through obstructions in a future version.

Synthesis:

Added the Bioprinting feature.

  • You can access the Bioprinting interface via Terminal - Synthesis - Bioprinting.

  • In this interface, you can perform Bioprinting by consuming the material Regenerative Pistils to produce specialty materials used for Resonator Ascension that are distributed across Huanglong: Jinzhou, the Black Shores, and Rinascita regions in previous versions.

  • The material Regenerative Pistil can be redeemed in the Oscillated Coral Store.

Echo & Enemy Gallery:

Added dynamic animations.

  • Echoes unlocked in the Data Bank - Echo Gallery interface will feature subtle dynamic animations.

  • Enemies unlocked in the Gallery - Enemies interface will feature subtle dynamic animations.

Auto-Play:

Optimized and adjusted the story Auto-Play feature.

  • During story segments, you can click the Auto-Play button in the top-right corner to select Semi-Auto mode or Full-Auto mode.

  • In Semi-Auto mode, the story will play automatically, but you must manually select dialogue options.

  • In Full-Auto mode, the story will play automatically. When a dialogue option appears, a countdown will be shown, during which you can still make a manual choice. If no choice is made or the mode is not switched before the countdown ends, the system will automatically select an option to progress the story.

WavesLine:

Optimized and adjusted the WavesLine system.

  • Added a click-to-speed-up feature. When chatting via Messages, you can click to speed up the chat bubble animations.

  • Added a Filter feature to WavesLine, allowing you to quickly filter contacts based on certain criteria.

  • Optimized the red dot notification for the WavesLine entry on the Terminal screen. The red dot at the entry will now be automatically cleared once you enter the WavesLine screen. (※If there are still unclaimed rewards in WavesLine, the red dot at the entry will remain.)

  • Optimized the sorting of messages. Messages with unclaimed rewards and unread messages will now be prioritized and displayed at the top.

Map

Optimized and adjusted certain map features and icon displays.

  • Added reward previews for Regional Gameplay of each area in Region Guide.

  • Optimized certain pathfinding logic. When clicking Go for a target located on a multi-layered map, the system will prioritize selecting the closest Resonance Beacon on the same layer. If there is no valid Resonance Beacon within range, the closest Resonance Beacon in straight-line distance will be selected.

  • Optimized certain icon display logic. Currently tracked icons will no longer be hidden when switching between other multi-layered maps.

  • Optimized the sorting of certain content on the Exploration Progress overview screen.

Progression

New Voyage Events:

Optimized and updated the novice events into New Voyage Events.

  • After the Version 3.5 update, Rovers who create a character and unlock the Event system will trigger a series of New Voyage Events.

  • New Voyage Events include New Voyage Login, A New Voyage, New Voyage Goals, Gifts of New Adventure, and New Voyage Aid. Among these, New Voyage Aid is a time-limited event, while the others are permanent events.

  • New Voyage Login unlocks rewards through daily logins. A New Voyage unlocks rewards by raising your Union Level. New Voyage Goals unlocks rewards by completing target objectives. Gifts of New Adventure unlocks rewards by completing Main Quests and Companion Stories.

  • Through the time-limited New Voyage Aid event, you can select a co-op Resonator to join your team for assistance, gaining more progression boosts and various benefits, such as: receiving Union EXP bonuses, unlocking early access to development materials, purchasing high-value New Voyage Bundles, and participating in New Voyage Convene.

For more details and rewards, please refer to the in-game New Voyage Events page.

Gameplay & Events

Endstate Matrix:

Adversity Vanguard S2 Cycle Rules Update

  • Adversity Vanguard: Point Acquisition

During the Adversity Vanguard challenge period of Endstate Matrix, the score multiplier will increase with each round. The specific rules are:

Round 1: Score Multiplier ×1.00

Round 2: Score Multiplier ×1.15

Round 3: Score Multiplier ×1.25

  • Adversity Vanguard: Matrix Mimic

During the Adversity Vanguard challenge period of Endstate Matrix, teams that defeat the Matrix Mimic will receive bonus points.

  • Adversity Vanguard: Emergency Agent

During the Adversity Vanguard challenge period of Endstate Matrix, one Resonator will become the Emergency Agent for each challenge stage, gaining 1 extra Vigor point.

  • Adversity Vanguard: Resonator Buffs

During the Adversity Vanguard challenge period of Endstate Matrix, the following Resonators will receive buffs:

Jiyan, Yinlin, Jinhsi, Changli, Zhezhi, Xiangli Yao, Camellya, Carlotta, Roccia, Phoebe, Brant, Cantarella.

  • You can view the cycle rules by clicking the button at the top of the Endstate Matrix event challenge page.

Optimized and adjusted the Endstate Matrix gameplay and certain features.

  • Added a challenge round multiplier display interface, where you can view more challenge details to help assess combat difficulty.

  • Added the Cycle Medal system. You can obtain Task Medals based on the number of Cycle Tasks completed within a Cycle, and Point Medals based on the highest score achieved in each stage of Singularity Expansion. The Cycle Medal interface and obtained medals can now be shared.

  • In the Endstate Matrix challenge, the death animations of defeated enemies will no longer block attacks on subsequent enemies.

  • When starting Tower of Adversity, Depths of Illusive Realm, or Endstate Matrix challenges, cooldowns for certain Resonator Skills and Weapon Skills can now be reset inside the instance.

Controls

  • Added vibration feedback when gliding, flying, and landing in Controller Mode.

  • Optimized Controller settings, allowing you to adjust the dead zone of the left and right sticks on your controller.

UI

Events Page:

Added Recommended navigation feature

  • Added a Recommended navigation entry to the bottom left of the Events page.

  • In the Recommended interface, you can quickly view the progress of your current Main Quest, the opening times of recommended content for the current version, and other details.

  • You can quickly jump to the corresponding content by clicking the Go button on its right.

Guide:

Optimized and adjusted certain Guidebook features

  • Material Collection instances in Huanglong (Jinzhou), the Black Shores, and Rinascita can now be accessed directly via the Guidebook interface without unlocking map markers or teleporting to the corresponding interactive areas on the map.

  • Certain Material Collection instances in Lahai-Roi and subsequent regions can also be accessed directly via the Guidebook once their map markers are unlocked.

  • Optimized the instance filter in the Guidebook, allowing certain instances to be filtered by weapon type.

Login Screen:

Updated the login screen to match the style of Version 3.5 Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang

  • Adjusted the background and visual performance of the login screen.

  • Adjusted the background music of the login screen.

  • Optimized the entry for the Starpaths Intertwined return system, changing it from the Profile page to the Terminal menu for direct access.

  • Optimized the display effect of the Sigil "Irreplaceable Memories" in certain interfaces.

  • Optimized the display of certain icons.

Graphics & Performance

Graphics Settings

Optimized and upgraded Intel GPU frame generation support to XeSS3

  • The following Intel GPUs support XeSS3:

Integrated Graphics: Intel processor integrated graphics with Iris Xe or Arc Graphics in their names.

Dedicated Graphics: All Intel Arc GPU series (A-series, B-series) and DG1 GPUs.

The game must be run in DX12 mode.

  • If the requirements are met, you can enable this feature under Settings - Graphics - Intel XeSS3. Once Intel XeSS3 is enabled, you can also select a frame generation multiplier from 2x, 3x, or 4x under the Frame Generation sub-option based on your hardware configuration and actual needs.

If the native frame rate is severely insufficient when XeSS3 frame generation is disabled, enabling the Frame Generation option can improve frame rates, but it may also introduce input latency and visual anomalies. Please use with caution.

  • After the Version 3.5 update, the Graphics Quality preset option in Graphics settings will affect the number of scene models in Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang, and subsequent regions. If you experience stuttering or frame drops, please try lowering the Graphics Quality preset.

  • Added seasonal changes to certain scenes in Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang.

  • Added visual feedback of raindrops interacting with Resonator models in rainy environments on PC.

  • Added floating fallen leaves on water surfaces in certain scenes of Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang on PC.

  • Added interactive feedback when attacking specialty plants in certain scenes of Mengzhou: Land of Xuanfang on PC.

Audio

Resonator Voice Customization:

Added Resonator Voice Customization feature

  • You can download supported Voicelines and quickly switch between them via the voice selection pop-up under Resonator profile screen.

  • Click the settings button next to the voice options or go to Settings - Language to enter the Resonator Voice Customization editing page, where you can filter and centrally manage your voice settings.

  • Resonator Voice Customization settings will be automatically saved to the server and support multi-device synchronization.

  • You can use the Manage Voice Packs function on the editing page to download or clear voice resources. If the voice resource being cleared is in use by a character, that character will automatically fall back to the default voice.

To ensure a consistent story experience, Resonator Voice Customization settings only apply to non-story voicelines. Story voicelines will still match your selected global language.

Dodge Sound Effects:

Optimized and adjusted the trigger mechanism for consecutive dodge sound effects

  • The trigger interval for consecutive dodge sound effects has been extended to 20 seconds. If no dodge is performed within 20 seconds after a dodge, the consecutive dodge count will reset.

  • Being hit by an enemy will reset the consecutive dodge count.

  • Optimized and adjusted certain sound effects and stereo performance.

Other

Client

Optimized storage space usage for the PC client

  • Resource compression technology has been applied to the Version 3.5 PC client, which will reduce the storage space required after installation to some extent.

  • After installing Version 3.5 on PC, the storage space usage is expected to be reduced by approximately 20 GB compared to Version 3.4.

The actual storage space reduced may vary depending on the channel/platform.

Optimized and adjusted the Resource Cleanup function on mobile devices

  • Adds an option to clear voice resources, allowing you to clear currently unused voice resources to free up more storage space.

  • The existing cleanup scope will now include certain completed instance resources, which can be cleared to free up more storage space.

  • Optimized and adjusted the description texts of certain game settings and functions.

Bug Fixes

Resonators & Weapons

  • Fixed an issue where Resonator Lucilla could occasionally experience abnormal camera behavior after casting the skill "Letting It Go."

  • Fixed an issue on mobile devices where casting Resonator Lucy's Resonance Liberation "Old Net Deep Dive" could occasionally cause the button's touch-response area to become abnormal, preventing the skill from being cast.

  • Fixed an issue where some enemies behind obstacles could not be seen after the Resonator Lucy used Sensor or applied the Involuntary Sharing effect to party members.

  • Fixed an issue where other Rovers would see abnormal skill visual effects when the Resonator Lucy cast her Basic Attack Stage 1 in Co-op Mode.

  • Fixed an issue where the Resonator Rebecca's machine gun might fail to deal damage to enemies when in Mk. 31 HMG mode after casting her Resonance Liberation: Party 'til Dawn!.

  • Fixed an issue where certain text was incorrect in Resonators Denia's and Qiuyuan's Information - Experience - Character Stories.

  • Fixed an issue where the Resonator Chisa's animations appeared abnormal after casting certain skills.

  • Fixed an issue where the Resonator Iuno's character model appeared abnormal after entering the Lunar Cycle state under certain circumstances.

  • Fixed an issue where the Resonator Iuno could not recover from being hit or knocked back in certain scenarios when casting her Resonance Skill: Arc Beyond the Edge.

  • Fixed an issue where the Resonator Buling might fail to obtain Minor Yang or Minor Yin correctly under certain operations.

Enemies & Echoes

  • Fixed an issue where enemies could abnormally be inflicted with the Glacio Bite Effect in certain combat scenarios where Negative Status cannot be applied.

  • Fixed an issue where the enemies Mourning Aix and Dragon of Dirge might fail to directly expose their Mistune state when casting certain skills.

System

  • Fixed compatibility issues when enabling Vulkan on certain Android devices equipped with Dimensity series chips. The Vulkan option will be restored for these devices after the Version 3.5 update.

  • Fixed an issue where the D-pad on controllers abnormally failed to function after connecting controllers to certain Android devices.

  • Fixed an issue where controller button prompts were displayed incorrectly when using certain Razer controllers.

  • Fixed an issue where crashes might occur when using the Skip feature in certain story quests.

  • Fixed an issue where some Resonators' Resonance Mode icons were displayed abnormally when switching Resonance Modes on the Team page.

  • Fixed an issue where the download progress bar might fail to display when downloading voice packs in Settings - Voice-Over Language.

  • Fixed an issue where Chat Bubbles were displayed abnormally under certain operations on the WavesLine - Interface settings page.

  • Fixed an issue where the notification avatars for some WavesLine messages were incorrect.

  • Fixed an issue where multiple Sonata Effect icons would abnormally appear for the selected Echo when performing Echo Modification on the Data Bank - Data Modify page.

  • Fixed an issue where some icons and text were displayed abnormally when some Rovers opened the Starpaths Intertwined page.

  • Fixed an issue where the selected Resonator would be abnormally obscured on the Birthday Blessing page under certain operations.

  • Fixed an issue where some description text for the item Shuyun Herbal Tea was incorrect.

  • Fixed an issue where text on the interface was incorrect during some loading screens.

Gameplay & Events

  • Fixed an issue in the Dreaming Deep event where some tutorial interfaces could not be closed under certain circumstances when using a controller.

  • Fixed an issue in the Restoration - Silent Crag gameplay where the displayed quantity of Type-F Restorative obtainable from the Silent Crag's Treasure Spot was incorrect. This fix does not affect the actual number of items obtained in the gameplay.

  • Fixed an issue in the Route Constructor Racing Challenge gameplay where the "New" tag might fail to disappear after completing the challenge.

  • Fixed an issue where some enemies in the Mournfell Canyon Tacet Field gameplay could easily and abnormally disengage from combat.

Quests

  • Fixed an issue where the Rover's model appeared abnormal in certain dialogue scenes during the Companion Story "A Fleeting Night's Dream" questline.

Environment

  • Fixed an issue where players could abnormally move outside the map under certain operations in the underground lab instance area.

  • Fixed an issue where snow scene effects appeared abnormal on some Android devices in the Roya Frostlands - Dimmr Plains area.

  • Fixed an issue where some NPC models floated or clipped through objects in the Roya Frostlands - Lahai-Roi area.

entry.title: [Tideforge Reverbs] Reverb Weapon Convene
entry.content:
During the event, selectable 5-Star Weapons: Verdant Summit, Stringmaster, Ages of Harvest, Blazing Brilliance, Rime-Draped Sprouts, Verity's Handle, and 4-Star Weapons: Dauntless Evernight, Variation, and Endless Collapse receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-08-19 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Tideforge Reverbs] is a Reverb Weapon Convene event banner. Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Reverb Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained. Any guarantee count not resulting in a 5-Star Weapon in this Reverb Weapon Convene banner will carry over to the next Reverb Weapon Convene banner.

  • You can select one 5-Star Weapon within a designated range as the Featured Weapon of the event banner (you can re-select at any time). Every time a 5-Star Weapon is obtained, it is guaranteed to be the Featured 5-Star Weapon selected.

  • Selectable 5-Star Weapons: Verdant Summit, Stringmaster, Ages of Harvest, Blazing Brilliance, Rime-Draped Sprouts, and Verity's Handle.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Starpath Reverbs] Reverb Resonator Convene
entry.content:
During the event, selectable 5-Star Resonators: Jiyan, Yinlin, Jinhsi, Changli, Zhezhi, and Xiangli Yao, and 4-Star Resonators: Buling, Sanhua, and Yangyang receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-08-19 11:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Starpath Reverbs] is a Reverb Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Reverb Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained. Any guarantee count not resulting in a 5-Star Resonator in this Reverb Resonator Convene banner will carry over to the next Reverb Resonator Convene banner.

  • You can select one 5-Star Resonator within a designated range as the Featured Resonator of the event banner (you can re-select at any time). Every time a 5-Star Resonator is obtained, there is a 50% chance it will be the Featured 5-Star Resonator of this event banner, and a 50% chance it will be a random non-Featured 5-Star Resonator (not including the selectable Resonators for this event banner). All 5-Star non-Featured Resonators have equal drop rate. If the 5-Star Resonator obtained is not the Featured Resonator selected, the next 5-Star Resonator is guaranteed to be the Featured Resonator.

  • Selectable 5-Star Resonators: Jiyan, Yinlin, Jinhsi, Changli, Zhezhi, and Xiangli Yao.

  • The above selectable 5-Star Resonators' Wavebands will be made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and they will be removed once the Reverb Resonator Convene event ends.

Gifts of Starpath

  • During the event, Convene in the Reverb Resonator Convene to accumulate Convenes and unlock corresponding milestone rewards.

  • After the event ends, any unclaimed event rewards will be reissued via in-game mail if you log in within 30 days.

  • During the ""Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns"" version period, a special event will be available: Reverb Resonator Convene's first 10x Convene is free. And the 10 free Convenes will also count toward the Gifts of Starpath's milestone count.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Azure Oath] Featured Weapon Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Azure Oath, 4-Star Weapons: Commando of Conviction, Hollow Mirage, and Discord receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Azure Oath.

  • Featured Weapon Azure Oath is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: [Voices on Azure Feathers] Featured Resonator Convene
entry.content:
During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Yangyang: Xuanling, 4-Star Resonators: Danjin, Chixia, and Aalto receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Voices on Azure Feathers] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Yangyang: Xuanling is exclusive to the [Voices on Azure Feathers] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Yangyang: Xuanling's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: Resonator Review | Radiant Spectrum — Lynae
entry.content: A Startorch Academy prep student whose head-turning, electric style hides an inner focus as explosive as a coiled spring.

entry.title: Resonator Review | Phase Transition - Luuk Herssen
entry.content:
The attending physician of Startorch Academy's Resonator Nursing Unit, renowned for his keen intellect and unshakable composure. Rumor has it nobody has ever seen him lose control.

He is a keen listener adept at dissecting the shadows in a person's heart. From the unhealing wound on his hand, golden blood seeps, a substance he can summon to become a blade of utmost precision.

entry.title: [Version 3.5 Featured Resonator/Weapon Convene: Phase I]
entry.content:
[When Winter Thaws] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Luuk Herssen, 4-Star Resonators: Danjin, Chixia, and Aalto receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [When Winter Thaws] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Luuk Herssen is exclusive to the [When Winter Thaws] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Luuk Herssen's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Undefined Spectrum] Featured Resonator Convene

During the event, 5-Star Resonator: Lynae, 4-Star Resonators: Danjin, Chixia, and Aalto receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Undefined Spectrum] is a Featured Resonator Convene event banner. Use Radiant Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Resonator Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Resonator is obtained.

  • Featured Resonator Lynae is exclusive to the [Undefined Spectrum] Featured Resonator Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

  • Featured Resonator Lynae's Waveband will be simultaneously made available in the Afterglow Coral Store with a limit of 2 purchases, and it will be removed once the Convene event ends.

  • During the event, all the Resonators who receive boosted drop rates will become available in Ascendant Aces as Trial Resonators. Complete their Ascendant Aces challenges to obtain rewards.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Daybreaker's Spine] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Daybreaker's Spine, 4-Star Weapons: Commando of Conviction, Hollow Mirage, and Discord receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Daybreaker's Spine.

  • Featured Weapon Daybreaker's Spine is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

[Spectrum Blaster] Featured Weapon Convene

During the event, 5-Star Weapon: Spectrum Blaster, 4-Star Weapons: Commando of Conviction, Hollow Mirage, and Discord receive boosted drop rates!

Duration

Version 3.5 update - 2026-07-30 09:59 (server time)

Eligibility

  • Reach Union Level 5.

  • Or complete the combat trial in First Resonance.

  • Or access Main Quest Fast Track Event and proceed with the Main Quest until you reach a certain point.

Convene Rules

  • [Absolute Pulsation] is a Featured Weapon Convene event banner.

  • Use Forging Tide to convene. You are guaranteed at least one 4-Star or higher rarity Resonator or Weapon every 10 attempts.

  • The guarantee count is shared among all Featured Weapon Convene events and is carried over until a 5-Star Weapon is obtained.

  • The 5-Star Weapon you Convene is guaranteed to be Spectrum Blaster.

  • Featured Weapon Spectrum Blaster is exclusive to the Featured Weapon Convene and will not be available by other means once the event ends.

For more details, please refer to the in-game Convene page.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Update Content | Version 3.5 "Blade of Past Resounds, Lingering Dream Hymns" Planned for Release on July 10 (UTC+8)
entry.content: Here's the event calendar for Version 3.5. Check it out for a quick overview of the event schedule! Full details about the update content can be viewed on our official website—be sure to take a look:

entry.title: Profile Reveal | Vessel of Sounds — Rover: Electro
entry.content:
Loading Data>>>

Rover: Electro

Rover has awakened a new Resonance Ability, wielding all-new Electro skills. The workings of the world in all its forms, all gathered in the palm of one hand. You made a promise to seek the faint reflection in the prism. The riddle that was never yours to solve now awaits an answer none could have foretold.

entry.title: Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event Winners Reveal
entry.content:
Wuthering Waves Fan Creation Event "The Dream Not Dreamed" has concluded, and we want to express our heartfelt appreciation to all participants for their dedication and creativity in our fan art event.

Let's view the winning entries and their contributors!

1st Place

@pokkkkaringo

@circles_pen

@yirin3617

nibkuna

@creeponite

@maltie00
